task_updates.executor_notes: Set `paddingTop` to `0px` in `LayoutMainContent` and removed the unused editor-pane fields from `usePanes()`. Verified the generations-pane `paddingBottom` path remained intact.

Added a route-unlock `useEffect` in `EditorPaneComponent` with dependencies on `location.pathname`, `isEditorPaneLocked`, and `setIsEditorPaneLocked`. Verified it runs before the video-editor early return and only unlocks when the pane is currently locked.

Changed `PanesContext` so the ideal editor height is `70%` when `locks.gens` is true and `90%` otherwise, and gated compression behind `bothVisible`. Verified `layoutValue` now exposes the variable `editorPaneHeight` and effective heights flow from that branch.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `LayoutMainContent` still computes `paddingBottom` from `isGenerationsPaneLocked || isGenerationsPaneOpen` and `effectiveGenerationsPaneHeight` after removing the editor `paddingTop` logic.
Confirmed the new `useEffect` is placed before the `isVideoEditorRoute(...)` early return, so the unlock path still executes on editor-route navigation.
Confirmed `editorPaneHeight` is now derived from a `70%/90%` fraction and is passed through `layoutValue`, so context consumers see the variable ideal height.
